lines.english: Fear is dispelled, meditating on the Fearless Lord.
The Word of the Guru's Shabad quiets worries and troubles.
Coming and going ceases, and all comforts are obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang har ke gun gaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
The Guru has carried me across the ocean of fire. ||2||
I have enshrined the Lotus Feet of the Lord within my heart.
Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to the Guru;
I was sinking down, and the Perfect Guru pulled me out.
I was cut off from the Lord for countless incarnations, and now the Guru united me with Him again. ||3||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, seek His Sanctuary.
meeting Him, I have been saved. ||4||56||125||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Name, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਭ ਤਪਤਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar sabh tapat bujhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the fire of desire is totally quenched. ||1||Pause||
Place your mind and body in offering before Him. ||1||
Renounce your arrogant pride, and end the cycle of birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਦਾਸ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਨਮਸਕਾਰਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har ke daas ke charan namasakaarahu |2|
lines.english: Bow in humility to the feet of the Lord's slave. ||2||
He alone obtains it, upon whose forehead such destiny is written.
Remember God in your mind, with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਜੋ ਚਾਲੈ ਨਾਲੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so dhan sanchahu jo chaalai naale |3|
lines.english: Gather only that wealth, which shall go with you. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
The dried branches are made green again in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੁ ॥੪॥੫੭॥੧੨੬॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak taa kee charanee laag |4|57|126|
lines.english: Says Nanak, fall at the Feet of that Lord. ||4||57||126||
The Perfect Divine Guru has removed my sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਕਉ ਦੀਨੀ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sevak kau deenee apunee sev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He blesses His servant with His service. ||1||Pause||
His Ambrosial Glance irrigates and revives them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਿ ਗਈ ਚਿੰਤ ਪੁਨੀ ਮਨ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: mitt gee chint punee man aasaa |
lines.english: Anxiety is removed, and the desires of the mind are fulfilled,
Pain is driven far away, and peace comes in its place;
when the True Guru, the Treasure of Excellence, shows His Kindness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਢੀਲ ਨ ਪਰੀ ਜਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dteel na paree jaa gur furamaae |3|
lines.english: there is no delay, when the Guru gives the Order. ||3||
Desires are fulfilled, when one meets the True Guru;
O Nanak, His humble servant is fruitful and prosperous. ||4||58||127||
The fever has departed; God has showered us with peace and tranquility.
A cooling peace prevails; God has granted this gift. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਬਿਛੁਰੇ ਮੇਲੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke bichhure mele |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Separated from Him for countless incarnations, we are now reunited with Him. ||1||Pause||
By God's Grace, we have become comfortable.
Meditating, meditating in remembrance on God's Name,
Twenty-four hours a day, O mortal, meditate on God. ||3||
In intuitive peace and poise, chant the Word of the Lord's Bani.
the dwelling of all disease is destroyed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਜਮੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad jam nerr na aavai |
lines.english: Pain, suffering and the Messenger of Death do not even approach that one,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੫੯॥੧੨੮॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jo har gun gaavai |4|59|128|
lines.english: says Nanak, who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||59||128||
which brought me to the Supreme Lord God, the Unjoined, Unlimited One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਬੇਲਾ ਕਉ ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: oeh belaa kau hau bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that time,
Auspicious is the day, and auspicious is the chance,
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Blessed is that moment, and blessed is that time,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਜਪੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit meraa man japai har naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: when my mind chants the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
when my tongue chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Haree. ||2||
Sacred are those feet, which walk on the Lord's Path. ||3||
Blessed is that forehead, which bows in humility to the Saints.
which has led me to touch the Feet of the Holy. ||4||60||129||
Says Nanak, auspicious is my karma,
